title: Sunday Braised Fish German Style
description: A hearty and comforting braised fish dish, infused with the rich flavors of German cuisine.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder and allspice, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Sunday sauce, beer (if using), and fish fillets.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise the fish for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Stir in the shredded red cabbage and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the braised fish hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (if desired).
